items.problem: runQuickstart silently discards writeSyntheticRegistry error when runInit fails
Unquoted fmt.Fprintf for provider name and base_url allows YAML structure injection if the refreshed API returns values containing ':', '#', or other special characters
keyEnvFlow scanner.Scan() failure (e.g. EOF on stdin) returns empty string with no error surfaced
resolveProfilePath uses filepath.Abs which does not resolve symlinks, allowing a user to bypass the atcr-owned file guard by passing a symlink pointing into .atcr/ or the registry
appendExport failure is logged to errOut but the error is swallowed — caller gets nil

positions.problem: appendExport failure is logged to errOut but the error is swallowed — caller gets nil

items.problem: shellSingleQuote does not escape control characters other than single-quote
validate rejects control characters in model ids but not in provider Name, BaseURL, or APIKeyEnv
`RegistryYAML` uses `fmt.Fprintf` for a simple string builder
